channel.title: Arknights Global — News Feed
channel.description: Latest news, events and updates from Rhodes Island — Arknights Global

item.title: Contingency Contract: Shadow over Leithania — New Season Live
item.description: The new Contingency Contract season is now available globally. Deploy your best operators and climb the risk ladder for exclusive rewards.

item.title: New Limited Banner — 6★ Operator Now Available
item.description: A new limited recruitment banner has arrived. Don't miss your chance to recruit this powerful 6-star operator before the banner ends.

item.title: Chapter 14: Shadows of Kazdel — Part II Now Available
item.description: The continuation of the Kazdel storyline is here. Uncover the truth behind the Sarkaz civil war in this brand new story chapter.

item.title: Maintenance Notice — March 20th Update
item.description: Scheduled maintenance on March 20th from 10:00 to 14:00 UTC. New content and balance adjustments will be applied during this window.

item.title: Operator Skin Sale — Limited Time Discount
item.description: Selected operator skins are on sale for a limited time. Check the in-game store for discounted costumes for Exusiai, SilverAsh, and more.

item.title: Annihilation Map Rotation — Week of March 16
item.description: This week's Annihilation rotation features the Chernobog map. Prepare your squad accordingly and collect your weekly orundum rewards.
